verse_text: Then the Lord spoke to Moses, 'Say to Aaron your brother, 'Take your rod in your hand and stretch out your hand over the waters of Egypt-over their rivers, their canals, their ponds, and all their standing water, so they may become blood. There shall be blood throughout all the land of Egypt, both in vessels of wood and of stone.' '

pericope.title: The Plague of Water Turned to Blood

links.context: As in the first plague of Egypt ([[EXO.7:14]]-25), the sea, marine life, and maritime commerce are affected.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
